Klasse PluginManager

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.PluginManager
public final class PluginManager extends Object

Central manager for the plugin system.

The PluginManager is responsible for coordinating the lifecycle of plugins, including installation, updating, uninstallation, and instantiation.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginManager

      public static PluginManager pluginManager(@NonNull PluginRepository repository)

      Creates a new PluginManager instance with the specified repository.

      Parameter:
      repository - the repository to use for storing and retrieving plugins; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new PluginManager instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if repository is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • pluginManager

      public static PluginManager pluginManager(@NonNull PluginRepository repository, @NonNull org.quurz.foomp.base.misc.LogAdapter logAdapter)

      Creates a new PluginManager instance with the specified repository and log adapter.

      Parameter:
      repository - the repository to use for storing and retrieving plugins; must not be null
      logAdapter - the adapter to use for logging; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new PluginManager instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if repository or logAdapter is null
      IllegalStateException - if the PluginManager has already been initialised
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • instance

      public static PluginManager instance()

      Returns the singleton instance of the PluginManager.

      Gibt zurück:
      the singleton instance
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if the PluginManager has not been initialised
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • constructor

      public <A> PluginConstructor<A> constructor(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Returns a PluginConstructor for the specified plugin.

      The constructor is cached and can be used to create one or more instances of the plugin that implement the contract A.

      Typparameter:
      A - the type of the plugin contract
      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a PluginConstructor instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if pluginId is null
      RuntimeException - if the plugin cannot be loaded or initialized
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • constructor

      public <A> PluginConstructor<A> constructor(@NonNull PluginId pluginId, @NonNull PluginChangeEventListener listener)

      Returns a PluginConstructor for the specified plugin and registers a listener for change events of that plugin.

      The listener is registered before the constructor is returned, ensuring it receives all subsequent lifecycle events for the plugin.

      Typparameter:
      A - the type of the plugin contract
      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      listener - the listener to register; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a PluginConstructor instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if pluginId or listener is null
      RuntimeException - if the plugin cannot be loaded or initialized
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • registerListener

      public void registerListener(@NonNull PluginId pluginId, @NonNull PluginChangeEventListener listener)

      Registers a listener for change events of the specified plugin.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the identifier of the plugin to listen to; must not be null
      listener - the listener to register; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if pluginId or listener is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • unregisterListener

      public void unregisterListener(@NonNull PluginId pluginId, @NonNull PluginChangeEventListener listener)

      Unregisters a listener from change events of the specified plugin.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      listener - the listener to unregister; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if pluginId or listener is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0
